ValidationRule.description: Permet de rendre impossible la modification du canal d'une demande de réclamation écrite
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(NOT($Setup.CS001_NeutraliserRegles__c.TECH_NeutraliserRegleValidation__c ), ISCHANGED(Origin), ISPICKVAL(Type,"Réclamation"), OR(ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Origin),"Email"), ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Origin),"Courrier"), ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Origin),"Espace Client"), ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Origin),"Application mobile"), ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Origin),"Réseaux sociaux"), ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Origin),"Site web"), ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Origin),"Site web réclamation"), ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Origin),"Site web Contact"), ISPICKVAL( PRIORVALUE(Origin),"Site web Chat"))
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: La modification du canal n'est pas possible
